title: Viking Therapeutics (VKTX) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text: Comprehensive analyst forecast and price target data for VKTX from Public.com. Aggregates analyst ratings and price targets from multiple Wall Street research firms. Shows consensus Strong Buy rating with substantial upside potential. Details analyst coverage including number of analysts, distribution of ratings (Strong Buy, Buy, Hold, Sell, Strong Sell), and consensus price target. Tracks changes in analyst sentiment and price target revisions over time as new data becomes available.
